src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/mi.title: Migrate `nx` imports to `@nx/devkit`
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/mi.description: The `nx` package is the CLI, not a public import surface. Move plugin and script imports to `@nx/devkit` so they keep working in future major versions.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Cache Misses
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to diagnose and fix issues when Nx tasks are not being replayed from cache as expected, using project configuration checks and Nx Cloud tools.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/ci-exec.title: Understanding "CI Execution Failed"
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/ci-exec.description: Common causes and solutions for CI execution failures in Nx Cloud

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/console.title: Troubleshoot Nx Console Issues
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/console.description: Learn how to resolve common issues with Nx Console, including Node.js version conflicts with nvm and WSL configuration in JetBrains IDEs.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/unknown.title: Unknown Local Cache Error
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/unknown.description: Learn how to troubleshoot and resolve Nx cache errors related to machine ID changes, network drives, and understand how Nx ensures cache security.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Convert to Inferred Migration
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to resolve common issues when migrating from executor-based tasks to inferred tasks in Nx, with specific solutions for Next.js, Remix, and other frameworks.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/an.title: Disable Graph Links Created from Analyzing Source Files
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/an.description: Learn how to configure Nx to only use dependencies defined in package.json instead of detecting dependencies from source code analysis.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.title: Include All package.json Files as Projects
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.description: Learn how to configure Nx to include all package.json files as projects in your workspace graph, not just those referenced in workspaces configuration.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/ya.title: Using Yarn Plug'n'Play with Nx
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/ya.description: Learn how to configure and use Yarn Plug'n'Play (PnP) in your Nx workspace to improve installation speed, reduce disk usage, and enforce dependency constraints.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.title: Troubleshoot Nx Installations
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/trouble.description: Learn how to resolve common Nx installation issues, including native module problems, platform compatibility, and Node.js architecture mismatches.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/id.title: Identify Dependencies Between Folders
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/id.description: Learn how to analyze and visualize dependencies between folders in your Nx workspace to help identify which code should be extracted into separate libraries.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.title: Including Assets in Your Build
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/in.description: Learn how to configure Nx executors to include and copy assets into your output bundle using regex patterns or object format for precise control.

src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/br.title: Configuring Browser Support
src/content/docs/guides/Tips-n-Tricks/br.description: Learn how to configure browser compatibility for your Nx applications using browserslist, optimize bundle size with modern browser targets, and debug your browser support configuration.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/perform.title: Profiling Performance
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/perform.description: Learn how to profile and optimize Nx task execution performance using Chrome DevTools and environment variables to identify bottlenecks and improve build times.

src/content/docs/troubleshooting/nx-sand.title: Fix Nx Commands Failing in Claude Code Sandbox
src/content/docs/troubleshooting/nx-sand.description: Nx commands fail inside Claude Code sandbox because Unix sockets are blocked. Set allowAllUnixSockets to fix daemon, plugin isolation, and forked process errors.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Console/conso.title: Nx Console Telemetry
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Console/conso.description: Learn about the telemetry data collected by Nx Console extensions, what information is gathered, and how to disable telemetry collection in different editors.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Console/conso.title: Troubleshoot Nx Console Issues
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Console/conso.description: Learn how to resolve common issues with Nx Console, including Node.js version conflicts with nvm and WSL configuration in JetBrains IDEs.

src/content/docs/guides/Installation/upd.title: Update Your Global Nx Installation
src/content/docs/guides/Installation/upd.description: Learn how to update your global Nx installation to avoid common errors when the workspace structure changes, including steps to identify and remove outdated installations.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Cloud/fix-san.title: Fix sandbox violations
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Cloud/fix-san.description: Step-by-step guide to download sandbox reports, classify each violation, and update project configuration so caching becomes reliable again.

src/content/docs/guides/Tasks & Caching/.title: Run Tasks in Parallel
src/content/docs/guides/Tasks & Caching/.description: Learn how to configure Nx to run multiple tasks simultaneously by adjusting the parallel option in the command line or nx.json configuration.

src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.title: Enable TypeScript Batch Mode
src/content/docs/technologies/typescript.description: Use the @nx/js:tsc batch implementation to compile multiple TypeScript projects in a single process, reducing build times for large workspaces.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Setup Incremental Builds for Angular Applications
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: Learn how to configure your Angular applications in Nx to use incremental builds, improving build performance by only rebuilding what changed.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Using Environment Variables in Angular Applications
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: Learn how to configure and use environment variables in Angular applications with Nx, including setup for ESBuild and TypeScript type definitions.

src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.title: Using Tailwind CSS with Angular
src/content/docs/technologies/angular/Gu.description: Learn how to set up and configure Tailwind CSS in Angular applications and libraries within an Nx workspace, including dependency management and Module Federation support.

src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.title: Deploying Next.js Applications to Vercel
src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.description: Learn how to configure and deploy Next.js applications from an Nx workspace to Vercel, including setting up build commands and implementing affected-based deployment.

src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.title: Using Environment Variables in React Applications
src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.description: Learn how to configure and use environment variables in React applications with Nx, including setup for Vite and Webpack, and handling conflicts between Nx and Vite.

src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.title: Using Tailwind CSS with React
src/content/docs/technologies/react/Guid.description: Learn how to set up and configure Tailwind CSS in your React applications within an Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/react/next.title: How to configure Next.js plugins
src/content/docs/technologies/react/next.description: A guide for configuring Next.js plugins with Nx

src/content/docs/technologies/vue/nuxt/G.title: Deploying Nuxt applications to Vercel
src/content/docs/technologies/vue/nuxt/G.description: A detailed guide on how to deploy Nuxt applications from Nx workspaces to Vercel.

src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.title: Deploying AWS Lambda Functions in Node.js
src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.description: Learn how to set up, develop, and deploy AWS Lambda functions in an Nx workspace using the @nx/aws-lambda plugin.

src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.title: Deploying a Node App to Fly.io
src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.description: Learn how to deploy a Node.js backend application from an Nx workspace to Fly.io, including Docker setup and automating the deployment process.

src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.title: Add and Deploy Netlify Edge Functions with Node
src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.description: Learn how to set up, develop, and deploy Node.js serverless functions to Netlify from an Nx workspace, including local development and production deployment.

src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.title: Wait for Tasks
src/content/docs/technologies/node/Guide.description: Learn how to ensure dependent tasks are completed before running a primary task in Nx, using dependsOn property or the waitUntilTargets option for Node executors.

src/content/docs/technologies/dotnet/Gui.title: Migrate from @nx-dotnet/core to @nx/dotnet
src/content/docs/technologies/dotnet/Gui.description: Step-by-step guide to migrate from the community @nx-dotnet/core plugin to the official @nx/dotnet plugin

src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.title: Using Tailwind CSS with Module Federation
src/content/docs/technologies/module-fed.description: Learn how to configure Tailwind CSS so that classes used in remote applications are properly compiled by the host application.

src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/esl.title: Dependency Checks ESLint Rule
src/content/docs/technologies/eslint/esl.description: Learn how to use the @nx/dependency-checks ESLint rule to identify mismatches between dependencies in package.json and actual project dependencies.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Using setupNodeEvents with Cypress preset
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Learn how to properly configure and use the setupNodeEvents function with Nx Cypress preset to customize Cypress behavior while maintaining web server functionality.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Migrating to Cypress V11
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: A guide to migrating your Nx projects from Cypress v8/v9 to v11, including configuration changes, file renaming, and handling potential edge cases.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Merge Atomized Playwright Outputs
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Learn how to enable output merging for atomized Playwright tests

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Angular - Configuring styles and preprocessor options
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide explains how to configure styles and preprocessor options for Angular Storybook projects in your Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Angular - Set up Compodoc for Storybook on Nx
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide explains how to set up Compodoc for Storybook in Angular projects within your Nx workspace.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Upgrading Storybook
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This guide explains how to upgrade Storybook in your Nx workspace using Nx migrations or the Storybook CLI.

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Migrating to @nx/vitest from @nx/vite
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: This is a migration guide to switch to @nx/vitest from @nx/vite

src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.title: Testing Without Building Dependencies
src/content/docs/technologies/test-tools.description: Learn how to configure Vitest to test projects using TypeScript project references without building dependency libraries first.

src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/why-.title: Monorepos
src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/why-.description: Understand the benefits of monorepos including shared code, atomic changes, developer mobility, and consistent dependencies across your organization.

src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/over.title: Monorepo vs Polyrepo: How to Choose
src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/over.description: Monorepo vs polyrepo comes down to how your teams agree to manage code, dependencies, ownership, and CI, not just technical limits.

src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/depe.title: Dependency Management Strategies
src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/depe.description: Compare independently maintained dependencies versus single version policy approaches for monorepos, with guidance on choosing the right strategy for your team.

src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/fold.title: Folder Structure
src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/fold.description: Learn about organizing your Nx monorepo with effective folder structures, and how to easily move or remove projects as your organization evolves.

src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/proj.title: Project Size
src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/proj.description: Understand the trade-offs of project granularity in Nx, including benefits like faster commands, clearer boundaries, and improved developer experience.

src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/code.title: Code Ownership
src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/code.description: Learn about code ownership challenges in monorepos and how Nx helps manage shared code with tools like CODEOWNERS and module boundary rules.

src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/proj.title: Project Dependency Rules
src/content/docs/concepts/Decisions/proj.description: Learn how to organize your Nx workspace with library types like feature, UI, data-access, and utility libraries, and enforce dependency rules between them.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/relea.title: Release TypeScript/JavaScript Packages to NPM
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/relea.description: Learn how to use Nx Release to version, generate changelogs, and publish TypeScript/JavaScript packages to NPM in your monorepo.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/publi.title: Using Nx Release with Rust
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/publi.description: Learn how to version Rust libraries, generate changelogs, and publish Rust crates in a monorepo using Nx Release with a step-by-step guide.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/relea.title: Release Docker Images
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/relea.description: Learn how to use Nx Release to version and publish Docker images from your monorepo with calendar-based versioning.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/autom.title: Automate GitHub Releases
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/autom.description: Learn how to configure Nx Release to automatically create GitHub releases with changelogs generated from your conventional commits, for both workspace and project-level releases.

src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/autom.title: Automate GitLab Releases
src/content/docs/guides/Nx Release/autom.description: Learn how to configure Nx Release to automatically create GitLab releases with changelogs generated from your conventional commits, for both workspace and project-level releases.
